title: Spring Onion Szechuan Soup
description: A low-calorie-friendly and tender sour soup featuring caramelized spring onions as a unique twist on a traditional dish.
instructions: Heat a small pan over medium heat and add sliced spring onions. Cook until they turn golden brown, stirring occasionally to prevent burning.
In a separate pot, combine the broth base with shaoxing wine, ginger slices, and garlic cloves. Bring to a simmer and let cook for about 5 minutes.
Gently fold in the caramelized spring onions and sprinkle with Sichuan pepper powder. Stir well to ensure all ingredients are evenly distributed.
Let the soup simmer for another couple of minutes before serving hot.
